summary: Tested Admin login, Transfers Queue, Users pagination/search, Accounts display, and verified Credit/Debit translation keys exist in translations.js. All requested features working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Admin login (admin@ecommbx.io / Admin@123456) - successful redirect to /admin
✅ Transfers Queue - displays transfers with SUBMITTED/COMPLETED/REJECTED tabs
✅ Transfers Queue - amounts in EU format (€X.XXX,XX): e.g., €199.235,00, €412.456,34, €1.800,00
✅ Users tab pagination - 'Showing 50 of 111 users', 'Page 1 of 3'
✅ Users tab search - 'guido' search returns 'Found 2 users matching "guido"'
✅ Accounts tab - displays accounts with IBANs, BICs, masked balances (€ •••••), action buttons
✅ Language switch - Italian mode works (Settings → 'Impostazioni', Light Mode → 'Modalità Chiara')
✅ Backend auth API working - /api/v1/auth/login returns valid JWT token
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit/Debit badges are implemented correctly in customer-facing transaction views (ProfessionalDashboard.js and Transactions.js). The badges show transaction TYPE (Credit=green for money IN, Debit=red for money OUT) not processing STATUS. Admin Transfers Queue correctly shows processing statuses (SUBMITTED/COMPLETED/REJECTED) which is appropriate for admin view. Translations for credit/debit exist in both EN and IT languages.
